metadata.title: Invoicing | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered invoicing platform for all your billing operations — from creation and delivery to payments, reconciliation, and global tax compliance.

hero.title: Invoicing made
hero.description: Automate your entire billing workflow — from creation to payment. Save hours every week with smart templates, auto-reminders, and instant reconciliation.

clickSendSection.title: Click. Invoice sent.
clickSendSection.description: Send professional invoices in seconds. Our intelligent system automates email delivery, payment reminders, and PDF generation — all with a single click.

mobileSection.title: Your invoices in your
mobileSection.description: Manage your entire invoicing workflow from anywhere. Create, send, and track invoices on the go with our native mobile apps.

paymentSection.title: Get paid
paymentSection.description: Accept payments from anywhere in the world. Seamless integration with major payment gateways, automatic reconciliation, and real-time payment tracking.

bankSection.title: Connect your bank.
bankSection.subtitle: Automate follow-ups.
bankSection.description: Never chase payments again. Smart bank synchronization combined with automated follow-ups ensures you get paid faster.

featuresSection.title: All the features done right.
featuresSection.description: Everything you need to manage invoicing, payments, and reconciliation in one place.

list.title: Global Tax Support
list.description: Pre-configured for 180+ countries with local tax requirements

list.title: Smart Reminders
list.description: Automated follow-ups via email and SMS

list.title: Custom Branding
list.description: Brand your invoices with custom designs

list.title: Auto-Tax Calculation
list.description: Smart tax engine for perfect accuracy

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Adon ERP transformed our invoicing workflow. We've reduced payment collection time by 60% and eliminated manual data entry entirely.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: The automated reconciliation feature alone saved us 20+ hours per month. Best invoicing platform we've ever used.

ctaBanner.title: Unleash your growth potential
ctaBanner.description: Join thousands of businesses already saving hours every week with intelligent invoicing.
